Patch Set 1:

> 
> As said in https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/aai/oom/+/95087, I think this proposal is more elegant to solve the initial issue (conflict in ports) as it keeps access to the service

you are right, but in the end we decided to access the service via the AAI proxy, thus the nodeport would not be needed
